items.name: Steam Momo
items.description: Mince marinated with aromatic spices, served with Cafe Talk sauce.

items.name: Kothey Momo
items.description: Steamed momo half pan fried, served with Cafe Talk sauce.

items.name: Fried Momo
items.description: Deep fried momo, served with Cafe Talk sauce.

items.name: Chilli Momo
items.description: Steamed / deep fried momo mixed with onion, capsicum and hot spicy sauce.

items.name: Momo Platter
items.description: 5pcs of Steam, Chilli & Fried Momo.

items.name: Chowmein
items.description: Stir fried noodles with vegetables, served with Cafe Talk sauce.

items.name: Momo Chowmein
items.description: Stir fried noodles with vegetables and choice of meat served with 5 pcs of momo.

items.name: Thukpa
items.description: Boiled noodles soup mixed with vegetables.

items.name: Momo Thukpa
items.description: Boiled noodles soup mixed with vegetables and steamed momo.

items.name: Fried Rice
items.description: Special Nepalese rice, pan fried with special Cafe Talk sauce.

items.name: Chicken Chilli
items.description: Juicy thigh chicken fillet pan fried on rich tomato chilli sauce with brown onion and capsicum.

items.name: Buff Chilli
items.description: Pan fried buff on rich tomato chilli sauce with brown onion and capsicum.

items.name: Paneer Chilli
items.description: Soft paneer cubes tossed with onions, capsicum, and green chilies in a spicy, savory sauce.

items.name: Sausage Chilli
items.description: Sliced sausages stir-fried with bell peppers, onions, garlic and green chillies in a tangy Nepali-style chilli sauce.

items.name: Chicken Chhoela
items.description: Char-grilled chicken with Nepalese spices.

items.name: Chhoela Set
items.description: Char-grilled chicken with Nepalese spices, served with rice flakes, roasted soyabean, pickles and salad.

items.name: Goat Sekuwa
items.description: Marinated goat meat in Nepalese herbs and spices cooked in char-grill.

items.name: Sekuwa Set
items.description: Marinated goat meat in Nepalese herbs and spices cooked in char-grill, served with puffed rice, pickles and salad.

items.name: Buff Sukuti
items.description: Smoked and fried buffalo meat stir-fried with Nepali herbs, garlic, ginger, onions, and green chilli. A bold and flavourful appetizer with a rich, chewy texture.

items.name: Buff Sukuti Set
items.description: Served with buff sukuti, bhatmas sandheko, mixed pickle, puffed rice, and fresh salad.

items.name: Veg Thali Set
items.description: Nepali style thali with steamed rice, creamy paneer curry, lentil soup (dal), sautéed greens, pickles, fresh salad, ghee and crispy papad.

items.name: Chicken Thali Set
items.description: Nepali-style thali with steamed rice, tender chicken curry, lentil soup (dal), sautéed greens, pickles, fresh salad, ghee and crispy papad.

items.name: Bhutan
items.description: Goat offal cooked in a traditional Nepalese style, widely eaten in Nepal.

items.name: Bhutan Set
items.description: Goat offal cooked in a traditional Nepalese style, served with rice flakes, roasted soyabean, pickles and salad.

items.name: Peanuts Sandheko
items.description: Roasted peanuts seasoned with oil, onions, chilli, coriander, and lemon juice. A tangy, spicy bar-style snack with a satisfying crunch.

items.name: Aloo Sandheko
items.description: A flavorful potato salad made with boiled potatoes, finely chopped onions, green chillies, and cilantro, all tossed in oil and traditional spices.

items.name: Wai Wai Sandheko
items.description: Crunchy instant noodles mixed with spices, fresh veggies, lemon, and mustard oil.

items.name: Hariyo Bhatmas Sandheko
items.description: Steamed green soybeans (hariyo bhatmas) mixed with mustard oil, fresh herbs, green chilies, garlic, ginger and Nepali spices. A zesty and nutritious snack.

items.name: Fried Bhatmas Sandheko
items.description: Crispy fried soybeans seasoned with oil, onions, chilli, coriander, and lemon juice. A tangy, spicy bar-style snack with a satisfying crunch.

items.name: Timur Chicken
items.description: Tender chicken stir-fried with Timur (Himalayan Sichuan pepper), garlic, ginger, and Nepali spices.

items.name: Pani Puri
items.description: Crispy hollow puris filled with a spicy & tangy tamarind-infused water, accompanied by a mix of boiled potatoes and chickpeas.

items.name: Chatpatte
items.description: Puffed rice mixed with boiled potato, fresh tomato, Spanish onion, fresh chilli, special Cafe Talk spice & tossed on fresh lemon juice and roasted mustard oil. Add WaiWai +2

items.name: Khaja Set
items.description: Chura, Bhatmas, Chhoila, Aalu dam, Mula Kakra ko achar, Aalu tama, Boiled Egg & Bara.

items.description: Chura, Bhatmas, Sekuwa, Bhutan & Chhoila.
